rule_metadata.name: fscan
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'fscan' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule fscan
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'fscan' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "fscan"
		rule_category = "offensive_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = /\sfscan\.exe/ nocase ascii wide
		$string2 = /\sfscan32\.exe/ nocase ascii wide
		$string3 = /\sfscan64\.exe/ nocase ascii wide
		$string4 = /\sfscanarm64\.exe/ nocase ascii wide
		$string5 = /\sfscanarmv6\.exe/ nocase ascii wide
		$string6 = /\sfscanarmv7\.exe/ nocase ascii wide
		$string7 = /\.\/fscan/
		$string8 = /\/fscan\.exe/ nocase ascii wide
		$string9 = /\/fscan\.git/ nocase ascii wide
		$string10 = "/fscan/releases/download/" nocase ascii wide
		$string11 = "/fscan_freebsd_arm64"
		$string12 = "/fscan_mac_arm64"
		$string13 = "/fscan32 "
		$string14 = /\/fscan32\.exe/ nocase ascii wide
		$string15 = "/fscan386 "
		$string16 = /\/fscan64\.exe/ nocase ascii wide
		$string17 = "/fscanamd64 "
		$string18 = /\/fscanarm64\.exe/ nocase ascii wide
		$string19 = /\/fscanarmv6\.exe/ nocase ascii wide
		$string20 = /\/fscanarmv7\.exe/ nocase ascii wide
		$string21 = /\[\+\]\sPocScan\s/ nocase ascii wide
		$string22 = /\[\+\]\sWmiExec\s/ nocase ascii wide
		$string23 = /\\fscan\.exe/ nocase ascii wide
		$string24 = /\\fscan\\common\\proxy/ nocase ascii wide
		$string25 = /\\fscan\\WebScan\\pocs\\/ nocase ascii wide
		$string26 = /\\fscan32\.exe/ nocase ascii wide
		$string27 = /\\fscan64\.exe/ nocase ascii wide
		$string28 = /\\fscanarm64\.exe/ nocase ascii wide
		$string29 = /\\fscanarmv6\.exe/ nocase ascii wide
		$string30 = /\\fscanarmv7\.exe/ nocase ascii wide

		$string59 = "b26458a0b60f4af597433fb7eff7b949ca96e59330f4e4bb85005e8bbcfa4f59" nocase ascii wide
		$string60 = "b4a1ab9bd2528e57f4a018ac84934c6bdcd67aaaf269f76c15fa739432409f3b" nocase ascii wide
		$string61 = "b9919cdb3ebf7abed7458e357a71924bb0dd43332e90c30a6f146caefcf56baa" nocase ascii wide
		$string62 = "bc422a4e1b6a351ac6fe73d496015cfa6a9dbd5e38566c6f44a59faff83ee95a" nocase ascii wide

		$string64 = "c86b6630f868d20303e940cd8f1a8805f1013bc567938a79cedb318b07f5f498" nocase ascii wide
		$string65 = "d61ec93dd0760f68a6b98f8dd073fcbbe7edeb55cbd3281f12df0af42ce6f794" nocase ascii wide
		$string66 = "d9940f5a09a04a949545eedb6818ce0ce001cc7596a63959e0940d31b6dc4834" nocase ascii wide
		$string67 = "d9d5daaecd31c7616b01456da34cb3b51006b5a7697af4cadfa8167e7a8b6f81" nocase ascii wide
		$string68 = "dc5d95d4ce6cee631b546e1bbfa9f090f66e4167edd5dd828f567c7fc30978dc" nocase ascii wide
		$string69 = "e2940f2785f9f9b38e5cac80100a401145f558602a7af45475760884aeba44f9" nocase ascii wide
		$string70 = "ebaa36db295f1c3a7d59e460ce6813221d0097f3c12ce26e818d4d4ac83c0919" nocase ascii wide
		$string71 = "f34bd1d485de437fe18360d1e850c3fd64415e49d691e610711d8d232071a0b1" nocase ascii wide
		$string72 = "f4ea99dc41cb7922d01955eef9303ec3a24b88c3318138855346de1e830ed09e" nocase ascii wide
		$string73 = "f6bb09ea48d85445fb1295a7b93ead6700a17c8f839624871f4faf024e18e39f" nocase ascii wide
		$string74 = /fscan\s\-h\s.{0,100}\// nocase ascii wide
		$string75 = /fscan\.exe\s\-/ nocase ascii wide
		$string76 = /Plugins\.Brutelist/
		$string77 = "Running final exploit packet" nocase ascii wide
		$string78 = "shadow1ng/fscan" nocase ascii wide
		$string79 = /User\-Agent\:\s.{0,100}echo\;\secho\;\s\/bin\/bash\s\-c\s/
		$metadata_regex_import = /\bimport\s+[a-zA-Z0-9_.]+\b/ nocase
		$metadata_regex_function = /function\s+[a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*\(/ nocase ascii
		$metadata_regex_php = /<\?php/ nocase ascii
		$metadata_regex_createobject = /(CreateObject|WScript\.)/ nocase ascii
		$metadata_regex_script = /<script\b/ nocase ascii
		$metadata_regex_javascript = /(let\s|const\s|function\s|document\.|console\.)/ nocase ascii
		$metadata_regex_powershell = /(Write-Host|Get-[a-zA-Z]+|Invoke-|param\(|\.SYNOPSIS)/ nocase ascii
		$metadata_regex_batch = /@(echo\s|call\s|set\s|goto\s|if\s|for\s|rem\s)/ nocase ascii
		$metadata_regex_shebang = /^#!\// nocase ascii

	condition:
		(( filesize < 20MB and ( uint16( 0 ) == 0x5a4d or uint16( 0 ) == 0x457f or uint32be( 0 ) == 0x7f454c46 or uint16( 0 ) == 0xfeca or uint16( 0 ) == 0xfacf or uint32( 0 ) == 0xbebafeca or uint32( 0 ) == 0x504B0304 or uint32( 0 ) == 0xCAFEBABE or uint32( 0 ) == 0x4D534346 or uint32( 0 ) == 0xD0CF11E0 or uint16( 0 ) == 0x2321 or uint16( 0 ) == 0x3c3f ) ) and 2 of ( $string* ) ) or ( filesize < 2MB and ( 2 of ( $string* ) and for any of ( $metadata_regex_* ) : ( @ <= 20000 ) ) )
}
